sections.paragraph:
ἀπογίνομαι 2 aor. ἀπεγενόμην (in our lit. opp. ζῆν) die (Hdt., Thu. [cp. 1, 39, 3 τῶν ἁμαρτημάτων ἀπογενόμενοι, in the sense ‘have no part in’], Teles 59, 11f; Dionys. Hal. 4, 15; SIG 1099, 15; SIG2 850, 12; pap, e.g. PMagd 29, 3; PRyl 65, 9; PGrenf II, 69, 10; PLips 29, 9; 10; 13; also s. Preis.; PGM 4, 719; cp. Jos., Ant. 5, 1) 1 Pt 2:24; Ox 1081, 12; 16 (=SJCh 89, 14) [οὐκ ἀπο]γείν[εται].—New Docs 3, 62. DELG s.v. γίγνομαι. M-M. TW.

aor. aor. = aorist

lit. lit. = literal(ly); literature (refererences to [scholarly] literature)

opp. opp. = opposed to, opposite

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

Thu Thu , V b.c.—List 5

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

Teles Teles , III b.c.—List 5

SIG SIG = Sylloge Inscriptionum Graecarum3; superscript omitted in text—List 3

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

e.g. e.g. = exempli gratia (for example)

PMagd PMagd = Papyrus de Magdôla—List 4

PRyl PRyl = Catalogue of the Greek Papyri in the John Rylands Library—List 4

PGrenf II PGrenf II = BGrenfell/AHunt, New Classical Fragments—Lists 4

PLips PLips = Griech. Urkunden der Papyrussammlung zu Leipzig—List 4

Preis. Preis. = FPreisigke, Wörterbuch der griech. Papyrusurkunden—Lists 4, 6

PGM PGM = Papyri Graecae Magicae—List 4

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Ox Ox = POxy, but refers to fragments of documents esp. relating to the lexical data base—List 1

SJCh SJCh = Sophia Jesu Christi—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 108
